title: auricula-ursi carniolica
intro: Auricula-ursi carniolica, also known as bearberry or kinnikinnick, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to Europe and North America. Its medicinal properties lie in its leaves, which contain arbutin, a compound with antiseptic and astringent properties that inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of auricula-ursi carniolica include its use as a natural remedy for urinary tract infections, diarrhea, and hemorrhoids, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and kill off pathogens. In herbal preparations, the leaves are typically dried and made into tea, capsules, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
